description_long: This town hall is a modern, multi-story public building with a flat roof and a geometric, angular form. The facade features large rectangular windows arranged in a grid pattern, providing ample natural light to the interior. A distinctive element is the row of colorful vertical panels above the main entrance, adding a vibrant accent to the otherwise neutral exterior. The building includes a prominent main entrance with wide glass doors and a small set of steps, as well as a secondary side entrance and an external staircase. The structure is primarily constructed from concrete and glass, with some metal framing visible around the windows. The overall design is functional and contemporary, with minimal ornamentation except for the colorful panels.
description: A modern, multi-story town hall with large grid windows, flat roof, and colorful vertical panels above the main entrance. The building features concrete and glass construction with minimal ornamentation.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, large grid windows, and colorful vertical panels above the doorway.
description_view_1: Side angle highlighting the colorful panels, curved glass corner, and the main entrance area.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a plain facade with minimal windows and a small side entrance.
description_view_3: Opposite side view featuring an external staircase and secondary entrance, with fewer windows.
attribute_facade_ornamentation: Minimal ornamentation with a row of colorful vertical panels above the main entrance.
attribute_entrance_design: Main entrance with wide glass double doors, framed by a small set of steps and colorful vertical panels above.
